c74object.name: mrt2~
c74object.description: A bridge object that takes MIDI input and outputs audio synthesized by Magenta RealTime 2 via a Python backend. It utilizes an asynchronous networking thread to communicate with a local Python server (mrt2_server.py), which runs the actual model inference.

inlet.description: Accepts standard Max MIDI messages (list) for note-on/off, and control messages such as 'prompt', 'model', 'connect', and 'disconnect'.

outlet.description: Outputs status messages from the bridge and logging information when the @log attribute is enabled.

attr.name: address
attr.description: The IP address of the MRT2 Python bridge server (default: 127.0.0.1).

attr.name: port
attr.description: The TCP port of the MRT2 Python bridge server (default: 9998).

attr.name: model
attr.description: The name of the MRT2 model to use (e.g., 'mrt2_small' or 'mrt2_base'). This is sent to the bridge upon connection.

attr.name: log
attr.description: Enables verbose logging to the third outlet (default: 0). Error messages are always posted to the Max console.

method.name: connect
method.description: Initiates an asynchronous connection to the Python bridge server. Audio streaming begins as soon as the connection is established.

method.name: disconnect
method.description: Closes the connection to the Python bridge server and stops the background networking thread.

method.name: prompt
method.description: Sets the text prompt for Magenta RealTime 2 (e.g., 'ambient pads with sub bass'). The prompt is sent to the bridge immediately if connected.

method.name: list
method.description: Processes standard MIDI note messages in the format [status, note, velocity]. These are forwarded to the MRT2 model to guide generation.
